summary: E-commerce or catalog project featuring a Cute Accessories section with earrings. User wants to remove images from the Cute Accessories section.

existing_features.title: Remove all product images (AI-generated earring images and any thumbnail switcher gallery) from the Cute Accessories page (CuteAccessoriesPage.tsx). Product cards should display without any image, showing only text-based content such as product name, description, and pricing.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove images from Cute Accessories section
